active_stop_condition: Production-candidate release tagged and repair capability verified

SV002-M0.name: Identity and scope declaration
SV002-M0.capability_delta: Entity exists with declared scope and forbidden actions. No operational action.
SV002-M0.stop_condition: Identity and scope recorded. No operational action taken.

SV002-M1.name: Observation and reporting
SV002-M1.capability_delta: Entity may observe supplied materials and produce reports.
SV002-M1.stop_condition: Report emitted. No operational action taken.

SV002-M2.name: Declared task execution + receipts
SV002-M2.capability_delta: Entity may run predefined tasks inside bounded environment. Every action receipted.
SV002-M2.stop_condition: Declared task completes or fails. Report and receipt emitted.
SV002-M2.promotion_criteria: Task catalog operational, receipts chaining correctly

SV002-M3.name: Remote target inspection (Data-Continuation/core-lite)
SV002-M3.capability_delta: Entity may inspect a remote target without mutating it.
SV002-M3.stop_condition: Inspection report and plan emitted. No target mutation.
SV002-M3.promotion_criteria: Remote inspection complete, StegVerse-001 repair candidate prepared

SV002-M4.name: Candidate preparation
SV002-M4.capability_delta: Entity may prepare candidate files, patches, manifests.
SV002-M4.promotion_criteria: SV001 repair candidates prepared for all known SV001-M3 blocker classes

SV002-M5.name: Core-Lite Intake Enablement
SV002-M5.capability_delta: Entity may continue within the Intake gate until STOP condition met.
SV002-M5.stop_condition: Core-Lite Intake succeeds with task_id blank and skip_tasks true.
SV002-M5.promotion_criteria: Intake run produces core_lite_run_summary.json, cge_fingerprint.json, core_lite_receipts.jsonl with no import/signature failures

SV002-M6.name: CGE + sandbox loop
SV002-M6.capability_delta: Entity may participate in sandbox experiments through CGE.
SV002-M6.stop_condition: Sandbox result classified. No production binding.
SV002-M6.promotion_criteria: CGE sandbox loop produces classified results with receipts

SV002-M7.name: LLM Adapter Gate
SV002-M7.capability_delta: External LLM reasoning admitted only as bounded transition instruction packets.
SV002-M7.stop_condition: Bounded instruction packet produced, or denied, or review required.
SV002-M7.promotion_criteria: LLM adapter gate produces instruction packets — not authority grants

SV002-M8.name: KnowledgeVault context-packet integration
SV002-M8.capability_delta: Selected KnowledgeVault context packets admitted through input gate with memory-use receipts.
SV002-M8.stop_condition: Context packet admitted with memory-use receipt emitted.
SV002-M8.promotion_criteria: KnowledgeVault context packets flow through CGE with receipts

SV002-M9.name: TV/TVC encryption layer
SV002-M9.capability_delta: TV policy + signing and TVC scoped authority token verification operational.
SV002-M9.stop_condition: TVC evidence manifest emitted with registry_verify_ok and authority_verify_ok.
SV002-M9.promotion_criteria: TVC roadmap 8 smoke path green: registry verify, authority issue/verify, chainlog

SV002-M10.name: Governed mutation proposal + quorum
SV002-M10.capability_delta: Entity may propose mutations and participate in review quorum. Cannot execute without approval.
SV002-M10.stop_condition: Production-candidate release tagged. Repair capability verified.
SV002-M10.promotion_criteria: v1.0.0-sv002-m10 tagged, StegVerse-001 repair capability proven, all stages complete
